description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script `npm install` and caches the `node_modules/` directory. Define four stages: code-check, push, functionnal-test, and deploy. In the code-check stage add a `linter` job that runs `npm run linter` on runners tagged linux, docker, nodejs and is excluded from tag pipelines, and a `unit-tests` job that runs `npm test` on the same tags and also excludes tag pipelines. In the push stage add a `coverage` job that runs only on push events, executes `npm run coverage`, and uses the same runner tags. In the functionnal-test stage add a `functionnal-test` job that runs only on the develop and master branches, executes `npm run TF`, and uses the linux/docker/nodejs tags, with all jobs set to `allow_failure: false`.
